Batch M-1 PUSH 2A — Class-B module lane (Ebene-2 'Switch-Module & Komponenten'). 22 SKUs: 7 Supervisor-Engines (WS-X45-SUP6-E/6L-E/7-E/7L-E/8-E/8L-E/9-E — SwK je Steckplatz + System, Uplink-Ports) + 15 Linecards (WS-X4748-12X48U+E/-UPOE+E/-RJ45V+E/-RJ45-E/-SFP-E, WS-X4712-SFP+E/-SFP-E, WS-X4724-SFP-E, WS-X4624/4612-SFP-E, WS-X4640-CSFP-E, WS-X4648-RJ45-E/-RJ45V-E/-RJ45V+E, WS-X4606-X2-E). Modultyp Supervisor-Engine/Linecard, Kompatible Serie Catalyst 4500-E (single-series), PoE on the 5 UPOE/PoE+ cards (reused Merkmal, gate-allowed). WEIGHTS = operator-decided SCOPED EXCEPTION (2026-06-28): Cisco never web-published per-module weights for the E-generation + no supplier feed -> the 22 ship CONSERVATIVE ZU_VERIFIZIEREN PLACEHOLDERS (over-estimated so shipping is never under-quoted; NOT measured, NOT sourced; physical-measurement follow-up). EMPTY weights were tried first but fail the switch weight-floor (emit defaults empty->0,05). TAA ++ linecards excluded (only ++= spares evidenced). EoS 2017/2020/2021 -> Beschreibung, banked. Prices Phase-1. Genuine new-sealed only

(3) SwK + Durchsatz = Line-Rate (datasheet gives no Gbps/Mpps; IE4000 precedent). (4) PoE=Nein all 12; no dedicated uplink (Uplink-Ports omitted, IE3500-Rugged convention). MACsec-256/Cyber-Vision/IOx/rings(REP/MRP/PRP)/PTP/license-tier = PROSE. Weights grounded (3,83/5,10/6,30 kg). CURRENT/ACTIVE -> NO EoS. Excluded: IP67 PSUs (PWR-IE160W/180W-67), SD-IE-16GB, CAB-CONSOLE-M12=, NW-A/DNA/MRP licenses. Prices Phase-1. Genuine new-sealed only

Same IE Rugged template (mirrors Cisco_IE3500); Merkmal tree UNCHANGED, NO new Merkmal, NO src change. 8 HW x -E/-A: 8T/16T/24T (GE M12) + 12FT4T/20FT4T (FE+GE, 4x GE uplink) + 14P2T (14 PoE+2) + 12P2MU2X (12 GE + 2 mGig 4PPoE/UPoE + 2 SFP+) + IE3505H-16T (advanced, lossless PRP/HSR/DLR); Portanz 8/16/24. Bauform = the approved 'Wandmontage (IP67/IP66, M12, lüfterlos)' value (shared with IE3400H). IOS-XE FLIP (affirmative 'Cisco IOS XE', no negation). Layer = L3 on all 16 (mirrors built Cisco_IE3500 Rugged; Essentials already has OSPF/RIP/PBR). SwK+Durchsatz = Line-Rate (no Gbps/Mpps). PER-MODEL splits (not flattened): PoE Ja ONLY on -14P2T (PoE/PoE+ 240 W) and -12P2MU2X (4PPoE/UPoE 240 W), Nein on the other 14; Uplink-Ports present only on 12FT4T/20FT4T (4x GE) and 12P2MU2X (2x SFP+), omitted on the rest. S.3=Portanzahl on all 16 (-14P2T 14+2=16, -12P2MU2X 12+2+2=16). PID-NAMING TRAPS banked exactly: 12P2MU2X appends the tier WITHOUT a dash (IE-3500H-12P2MU2XE/...XA); the advanced variant is IE-3505H-16T-E/-A (3505, not 3500). MACsec-256/TSN-frame-preemption/SD-Access/Cyber-Vision/IOx/ThousandEyes/rings/PTP = PROSE. Weights grounded (3,83/5,10/5,17/6,30 kg). CURRENT/ACTIVE -> NO EoS. Excluded: SD-IE-16GB, CAB-CONSOLE-M12=, CW-SFP-KIT, NW-A/DNA licenses, IP67 PSUs. THE IE LANE IS NOW CLOSED (IE1000/2000/3000/4000/5000 + IE3100-3500 Rugged + IE3400H/IE3500H). Prices Phase-1. Genuine new-sealed only

Family: Cisco Industrial Ethernet IE1000 (rugged DIN-rail, lightly-managed)
Notes: COMPLETE family, 4 chassis PIDs (c78-737277). Same IE Rugged template (mirrors Cisco_IE3500); Merkmal tree UNCHANGED, NO new Merkmal, NO src change. DIVERGENCE: management plane is PER-FAMILY -- IE1000 is NOT Cisco IOS and NOT IOS-XE, it runs lightly-managed Web-GUI firmware (Cisco Device Manager, releases 1.9.x). So NO 'Cisco IOS (nicht IOS-XE)' negation (zero IOS tokens on IE1000; affirmative 'IOS XE' grep stays 0 across the whole bundle); Durchsatz = Line-Rate (no Mpps in datasheet -> none computed, like IE4000); STILL ACTIVE -> NO EoS, no EoL flag. 4 chassis: IE-1000-4T1T-LM (Portanz 5) / 6T2T-LM (8) / 4P2S-LM (6) / 8P2S-LM (10); all Layer L2, SwK 5,6 Gbit/s, Switch-Typ Managed, Stacking Nein, DIN-rail, IP30. PER-MODEL SPLITS: Betriebstemperatur -20 C on 4T1T/6T2T vs -40 C on 4P2S/8P2S; PoE=Ja only on the -P models (bis 120/180 W). S.3=Portanzahl on all 4. EtherNet/IP(CIP)/RSTP-MSTP/802.1x-MAB/IGMP-DHCP-snooping/EtherChannel = PROSE, no Merkmal. Weights grounded (0,50/0,57/0,77/0,84 kg). Excluded: PWR-IE PSUs, STK-RACK-DINRAIL=. Prices Phase-1 (provisional). Genuine new-sealed only

COMPLETE family, 25 chassis PIDs (c78-730729). NOT a new device class -- same established IE Rugged template as IE4000 (mirrors Cisco_IE3500 standard 15-attr switch model); Merkmal tree UNCHANGED (verified attr-name set == IE3500), NO new Merkmal, NO src change. LICENSE-TIER BANKING (IE3300/3400/3500 precedent): IE2000 bakes the license tier into the chassis PID (-L LAN Lite / -B LAN Base / -E LAN Base+1588/L2NAT / -N Enhanced LAN Base) -> banked as 25 distinct orderable chassis PIDs (the 8-port -E/-N are genuinely different hardware: longer chassis 1,56 vs 1,25 kg). EXCLUDED (not hardware): IE-LICENSE-SPARE, L-/LIC-IE2000-*, LIC-MRP-*, IE2000-DNA-*, SD-IE-1GB=, STK-RACK-DINRAIL=, Wallmount-IE2k-*, PWR-IE* (the '(PWR-IE-Serie)' in the Stromversorgung VALUE is a prose ref, not a banked PSU PID -- IE3500 precedent). 25 chassis: 6-port 4-access (10: 4TS/4T/4TS-G/4T-G x -L/-B + 4S-TS-G x -L/-B) + 8-port (6: 8TC/8TC-G x -L/-B + 8TC-G-E/-N) + 16-port (9: 16TC x 6 incl -X conformal-coat + 16PTC-G x -L/-E/-NX). Portanzahl 6/10/20/18. MODEL (standard switch): Portanzahl = TOTAL access+uplink SUMMED, all N× -> S.3=Portanzahl on all 25 (the 16PTC '(4x PoE+)' subset WORD-FORMED 'vier davon PoE+' so the regex does NOT add it). Uplink-Ports per-PID. Layer = L2 (LAN Lite/Base); full L3 via IP-Lite upgrade -> PROSE only, never the Layer value. SwK 7,6 Gbit/s (NOT doubled); Durchsatz 5,66 Mpps (datasheet gives it explicitly -- banked, unlike the IE4000 Mpps gap). Bauform Kompakt-Industriegehäuse (DIN, lüfterlos); IP30/ATEX/conformal-coating(-X/-NX)/ring(REP/PROFINET-MRP)/CIP/PROFINET/PTPv2/Layer-2-NAT/license-tier = PROSE, no Merkmal; -40..70 C (S.5 reverse PASS). IOS (NOT IOS-XE; uses the 'Cisco IOS (nicht IOS-XE)' negation). Weights grounded per chassis (1,11/1,22/1,25/1,56/1,97 kg, no ZU_VERIFIZIEREN). EoL EoS 10-Apr-2024 (replacement IE3100/3200/3400 -> prose), never dropped. PRINCIPLE: bank distinct orderable chassis PIDs incl license-tier variants; exclude pure-software-license + accessory + PSU PIDs. Prices Phase-2 (provisional). Genuine new-sealed only

NOT a new device class -- reuses the established IE Rugged template (Cisco_IE3500 standard 15-attr switch model, industrial semantics on EXISTING attrs); Merkmal tree UNCHANGED (verified attr-name set == IE3500), NO new Merkmal, NO IP-Schutzart, NO src change. LESSON: check for precedent before growing the schema -- the IE Rugged precedent already carried industrial semantics on Bauform/Betriebstemperatur/Anwendung, so the IP-rating-as-Merkmal idea was correctly dropped. 12 chassis: 4TC4G/8T4G/8S4G/4T4P4G/16T4G/4S8P4G (FE-access, 100M/1G) + 8GT4G/8GS4G/4GC4GP4G/16GT4G/8GT8GP4G/4GS8GP4G (GE-access, 1G); Portanzahl 8/12/12/12/20/16/12/12/12/20/20/16. MODEL (standard switch, NOT FEX): Portanzahl = TOTAL ports access+uplink SUMMED, all in N× form -> S.3=Portanzahl on all 12; Uplink-Ports = 4× GE-Combo (SFP/RJ45) on every model (counted in Portanzahl, unlike a FEX). Layer = L2 (base LAN Base + static IPv4); full L3 (OSPF/EIGRP/BGP/PBR) + MACsec-128 = IP-Services upgrade -> PROSE only, never the Layer value. SwK 20 Gbit/s (all, NOT doubled). Durchsatz = 'Line-Rate (alle Ports/Paketgrößen)' -- datasheet gives NO Mpps, none fabricated/computed. PoE per model (7 data / 4x 125W / 1x 240W). Bauform = Kompakt-Industriegehäuse (DIN, lüfterlos); IP30 in Anwendung prose not Bauform; -40..+75 C (S.5 reverse PASS). Industrial protocols (CIP/EtherNet-IP/PROFINET/MODBUS)/ring (REP/PRP/MRP/HSR)/PTPv2/Layer-2-NAT/dying-gasp/alarm-I/O/ATEX = PROSE, no Merkmal. IOS (NOT IOS-XE; IE3x00 Rugged are IOS-XE). 1 chassis PID each (no PWR-IE/SD-IE/STK-RACK-DINRAIL/license PIDs). Weight 2,88 kg grounded (no ZU_VERIFIZIEREN). FCoE/Unified/FC-speeds -> PROSE, NO Merkmal. GEM/L3 modules = module: not banked, not in Portanzahl (slots spelled without 'x' so S.3 = base fixed). SwK full-system NOT doubled (logged; Portanz = base fixed). No grounded buffer/ECMP in c78-618603 -> omitted (flag-don't-fabricate); cut-through + bis-24-FEX carry the prose. Weights include expansion modules -> base ZU_VERIFIZIEREN. EoL announced 03-Apr-2019, EoS ZU_VERIFIZIEREN. NX-OS (IOS XE absent). 1 base PID each. Prices Phase-2 (provisional). Genuine new-sealed only

Batch-1 fixed Catalyst — gemanagter L3-Access-Switch (Managed, 1 HE; ORIGINAL 2005-era 3560, NOT 3560-X/-CX/-C). 16 SKUs = 8 base x -S (IP Base/SMI) / -E (IP Services/EMI) tier-granularity (3560-X/3750-X precedent; bare PID ohne Suffix nicht orderbar). Stacking nein (3560 stapelt nicht, anders als 3750). SwK 32 Gbit/s (GROUNDED: Cisco-Datenblatt 'forwarding bandwidth', serienweiter Wert; via Wayback product_data_sheet09186a00801f3d7d; FE-48 Reseller-Backplane 17,6 Gbit/s als VLog-Caveat). Gewichte grounded per-PID (3,9-7,0 kg, Cisco-Datenblatt-Physik). Uplink-Ports Merkmal (2x/4x SFP GbE). Betriebstemp 0-45C. EoS 2013 -> Beschreibung, banked. EXCLUDED: License-Kits (CD-3560-EMI=/CD-3560G-EMI=), RPS-675, =-Spares. Prices Phase-1. Genuine new-sealed only
